summary: WooCommerce e-commerce flow testing complete. All backend tests pass (27/27). New frontend tests for products and cart pass (13/13). Fixed critical SparkleBackground/tsparticles v3 incompatibility bug that was blocking the frontend. Existing i18n navigation tests need updating due to navigation structure changes.

issues: Hungarian (hu) language option was removed from LanguageSwitcher - only EN, EL, IT available now

quarantined_tests.reason: Navigation structure changed - tests reference removed data-testids (nav-link-gallery) and removed language (hu)

action_items: Update i18n-navigation.spec.ts - navigation structure changed, nav-link-gallery no longer exists
Consider restoring Hungarian language option in LanguageSwitcher if needed, or remove hu tests

fixes_applied.issue: tsparticles v3 incompatibility - 'engine.checkVersion is not a function' error blocking entire frontend
fixes_applied.fix: Upgraded from react-tsparticles v2 + tsparticles v3 (incompatible) to @tsparticles/react v3 + @tsparticles/slim v3 (compatible). Updated component to use new v3 API (initParticlesEngine, loadSlim)

woocommerce_products_cache.notes: GET /api/wc/products with TTL cache working. Second requests hit cache.

diy_kits_listing.notes: GET /api/wc/products?product_type=diy-kit returns 6 products including simple DIY Starter Kit

diy_kit_price_bug.notes: Verified DIY kit prices don't have 0.85 multiplier bug. DIY prices are higher than Ready Florarium prices as expected.

woocommerce_checkout.notes: POST /api/wc/checkout creates WC order and returns checkout URL. Cart is cleared after successful checkout. Handles diy- prefix in product IDs.

frontend_gallery.notes: TerrariumGallery displays products from WooCommerce with prices in Euro

frontend_diy_kits.notes: DIYKits section displays products correctly. DIY Starter Kit shows €34.99 (correct price)

frontend_cart_drawer.notes: CartDrawer opens/closes, shows items, removes items, displays total with Euro. Checkout button visible.

seed_data_creation: Backend tests use unique UUIDs and TEST_ prefixes. Frontend tests set unique sessionId in localStorage for isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WooCommerce integration fully tested. SparkleBackground component fixed for tsparticles v3. Existing i18n-navigation tests need updating - navigation structure changed (nav-link-gallery removed) and Hungarian language option removed from LanguageSwitcher.
